schedules_text:
Gate A at (8,6): open exactly when (t mod 4) is in {1, 2}. So it is open at t=1,2,5,6,... and closed at t=0,3,4,7,... You can only step ONTO it at a tick t+1 where it is open.
Guard P: walks a fixed cycle of length 6. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 6) as follows: t mod 6=0: (7,5); t mod 6=1: (6,5); t mod 6=2: (6,6); t mod 6=3: (6,7); t mod 6=4: (6,6); t mod 6=5: (6,5). This repeats forever.
Guard Q: walks a fixed cycle of length 8. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 8) as follows: t mod 8=0: (2,1); t mod 8=1: (2,2); t mod 8=2: (3,2); t mod 8=3: (3,3); t mod 8=4: (2,3); t mod 8=5: (3,3); t mod 8=6: (3,2); t mod 8=7: (2,2). This repeats forever.
parcels_text:
Parcel 1: pick it up at (4,2) (map glyph '1'), deliver it to (5,3) (map glyph 'x'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
Parcel 2: pick it up at (3,7) (map glyph '2'), deliver it to (7,8) (map glyph 'y'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
